title: Startale raises $50M from SBI to complete $63M Series A
message_html: Startale raises $50M from SBI to complete $63M Series A ...
snippet: Startale said SBI invested $50 million to complete its Series A, with the firms working on tokenized securities, stablecoins and consumer onchain products in Japan.

title: Startale Group closes $63 million Series A with investments from SBI Group and Sony Innovation Fund
message_html: Startale Group closes $63 million Series A with investments from SBI Group and Sony Innovation Fund ...
snippet: The company said it will use the capital to scale Layer 1 network Strium to power institutional tokenized securities and RWA trading.
